description_en: Warsaw may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 200 halal restaurants and 4 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Warsaw, Poland, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Warsaw: 200+ halal restaurants, 4 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 2.9/5.
